project_type: Nx monorepo with Angular 21 frontend, AWS CDK infra, and TypeScript Lambda API
build_system: Nx 22.7.3 with pnpm 10.14.0. Build via 'pnpm nx build web'. No test runner configured (unitTestRunner: none).
test_framework: No test runner currently configured. Vitest recommended per steering docs but not set up.
test_command: No test command available (no test runner configured)
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'pnpm install' to install dependencies. 2. Run 'pnpm nx build web' to compile the Angular frontend. 3. Run 'node scripts/verify-web-build.js' to validate build output.
setup_instructions: 1. corepack enable (for pnpm). 2. pnpm install. 3. pnpm nx build web.
environment_constraints: node_modules not installed yet. Need to run pnpm install first. Network required for package installation.
contribution_requirements: Standalone components only (no NgModules). OnPush change detection. Selector prefix 'rm-'. SCSS for styles. i18n via @ngx-translate/core with en.json and de.json. Reactive forms with FormBuilder. Services use @Injectable({ providedIn: 'root' }). Auth uses amazon-cognito-identity-js library directly.
key_patterns: Auth components follow a consistent pattern: standalone component with inline template/styles, ReactiveFormsModule, RouterLink, TranslatePipe imports. Forms use FormBuilder with Validators. Auth operations return Observable<void> wrapping Cognito SDK callbacks in Promises. Error messages displayed via errorMessage string. Loading state managed via boolean. Navigation via Router.navigate(). i18n keys follow AUTH.<FEATURE>.<LABEL> pattern.
directory_structure: apps/web/src/app/auth/ - auth module with guard, interceptor, service, and page components. apps/web/src/app/recipes/ - recipe CRUD components. apps/web/src/app/config/ - config service. apps/web/src/assets/i18n/ - translation JSON files. apps/api/src/ - Lambda handler. libs/shared/src/ - shared interfaces.
